title: ImmersiveThunder: Reforged
description: An updated fork of ImmersiveThunder featuring immersive distance-based thunder sounds for modern Minecraft.
body:
# ImmersiveThunder: Reforged ---

--- **ImmersiveThunder: Reforged** replaces the default thunder with more immersive sounds that react to distance. Nearby strikes sound loud and intense, while distant thunder is quieter and reaches the player with a delay. - Requires **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**. - Best experienced with **[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)**. ## 📖 About This Fork **ImmersiveThunder: Reforged** is an unofficial maintained fork of the original **[ImmersiveThunder](https://github.com/netcatgirl/ImmersiveThunder)**. It updates the mod for newer Minecraft versions and modern Fabric releases while keeping the original immersive thunder experience intact. ## 💳 Credits - **netcatgirl** — original creator of **[ImmersiveThunder](https://github.com/netcatgirl/ImmersiveThunder)** - **Original Source:** [netcatgirl/ImmersiveThunder](https://github.com/netcatgirl/ImmersiveThunder) - **Original Mod Modrinth page:** [ImmersiveThunder on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder) > ## ⚠️ Attention > This is an unofficial continuation of ImmersiveThunder and is not affiliated with or maintained by the original author.
